en.text: to them which were of reputation
to be somewhat in conference added
to live as do the Jews
? turn ye again: or, turn ye back elements: or, rudiments
. I stand: or, I am perplexed for you I stand: or, I am perplexed for you
. covenants: or, testaments Sinai: Gr. Sina
. answereth to: or, is in the same rank with
is become of no effect unto you
? hinder you: or, drive you back
them who are of the household
